title: Fresh alpha releases for the SDK and UI libraries
summary:
New alpha releases for the SDK and UI libraries, plus a quick migration to get the Klein image model back online.

We pushed new alpha versions for the React ecosystem. The SDK now includes a fetchModelCatalog() helper to programmatically pull model metadata, alongside a new client subpath. The UI library gets a design system bump with fresh primitives for file uploads, markdown, and a unified model selector.

A host outage knocked the FLUX.2-klein-4B model offline. We migrated it to a fresh A5000 instance on RunPod and updated the routing. The 5xx errors are gone and generation is stable again.
